If tomatoes are a fruit then is ketchup a smoothie. Not only that, but salsa is fruit salad. lasagna is just pizza flavoured cake. Popcorn is a vegetable. Is a pop tart ravioli? Is cereal a soup? How many holes does a straw have? If you're in a competition by yourself, do you come in first or last? If I hit myself and it hurts, am I weak or strong? If time is money, is an ATM a time machine? and the ultimate question, If you’re bald, what hair color do they put on your license?
